description: Style Note When you wear buckaroo shoes, you are making a style statement that is immediately identifiable and extremely trendy. With Mexican Cowboy roots, these shoes crafted from pure and high quality leather are comfortable and extremely sought after. Make the style statement that will leave a mark with this pair of slip on shoes. Product Details Square toed, red slip on shoes with stitched detail around the toe box Nubuck upper with branding on the tongue and at the side Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Soft footbed Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves in the forefoot and heel region, slightly extended at the heel Material and Care Nubuck Wipe with a clean dry cloth and then brush with a Nubuck brush
